input.query: Onde eu verifico o debug mode no Journey Builder / Bot Studio? Quero saber em qual tela ou área checar isso.

output.answer:
**Create a New Journey from Scratch**
Exact path and steps
- Getting Started with Bot Studio
- Create a New Journey from Scratch
- To build a journey manually:
- Click ‘Create Journey’
- In the dialogue, choose “Start from Scratch”

input.query: What is Agent Assist in Gupshup Console? What does it do and how is it used? Omnichannel inbox, routing, workflows, AI features

output.answer:
**Getting started (from the documentation)**
- Inbox / agent work: Gupshup Console → Agent Assist → Chats
- Configuration (users, teams, chat rules, responses, AI): Gupshup Console → Agent Assist → Settings
- Reports: Gupshup Console → Agent Assist → Insights

**Where to go next — the most relevant pages are:**
- About Agent Assist
- Agent Assist API Documentation
- Response Management: Auto Replies & Customer Satisfaction
- Sending Marketing Templates from Agent Assist

For step-by-step actions, ask about a specific page above (for example routing rules, teams, or templates).

---
**Need more detail?** Reply with **more detail**, **step by step**, or ask a specific follow-up (fields, API payload, edge cases) and I’ll expand on this topic.

**Videos:**
- [Agent Assist Overview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T35qJ0uTQhc&t=26&cc_load_policy=1&cc_lang_pref=en&hl=en)
- [Agent Assist Settings](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yjk0GJXl8v8&t=82&cc_load_policy=1&cc_lang_pref=en&hl=en)
- [Creating & Publishing Message Templates](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p8XsoaMUyd0&t=355&cc_load_policy=1&cc_lang_pref=en&hl=en)
- [Agent Assist Analytics & Reports](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8JIgkvdCjZk&t=4&cc_load_policy=1&cc_lang_pref=en&hl=en)

input.query: Where can advanced messages be tracked by customer on Gupshup Console?

output.answer:
**What is Gupshup Console? 🚀**
Exact path and steps
- Welcome to Gupshup Console
- What is Gupshup Console? 🚀
- Gupshup Console is your unified conversational messaging platform that brings together all your customer engagement tools in one powerful interface. Whether you're running marketing campaigns, deploying chatbots, or managing customer support, Console simplifies multi-channel communication across WhatsApp, SMS, Web, and Instagram.
- Start your conversational journey with our comprehensive platform designed for modern customer engagement.
- Migrate from smsgupshup.com seamlessly and manage multiple accounts through Extensions in one unified interface.
